overall.description: A cinematic drive along a rain-soaked coastal highway in a futuristic city at dusk, featuring neon-lit bus shelters, palm-lined roads, and massive digital billboards against an industrial skyline. The footage exhibits the high-fidelity rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077, with wet pavement reflections and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway approaching illuminated transit shelter

passing the neon-lit bus shelter on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the wet highway toward the distant city skyline, approaching and passing a transit shelter

scattered palm trees lining the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked coastal highway at dusk, driving toward a futuristic city skyline. The camera passes a concrete pole and approaches a neon-lit bus shelter on the right, with palm trees scattered along the roadside and industrial smokestacks visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with industrial waterfront and moonrise

events.description: full moon becomes visible in the sky above the industrial skyline
view shifts from commercial skyscrapers to industrial smokestacks across the water

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the moon rises over the industrial district, with mountains becoming visible in the background

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the dusk sky
mountain range silhouetted against the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed the bus shelter, the drive continues along the open coastal road as the full moon becomes visible in the sky. The city skyline transitions to an industrial waterfront view with prominent smokestacks, while distant mountains emerge on the horizon and palm trees line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with massive digital billboards and mountain backdrop

events.description: large illuminated digital billboards become prominent on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving past towering digital billboards displaying advertisements, with the mountain range dominating the background

entered.detail: large digital advertising screen showing illuminated content
massive billboard structure with bright digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the highway passing massive digital billboards on the left that tower over the road. The industrial skyline gives way to a prominent mountain backdrop as the drive continues along the wet asphalt, with street lights periodically illuminating the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rain-slicked coastal highway that transitions from a neon-lit roadside into a vast industrial landscape framed by mountains. It begins by gliding past a concrete pole and a glowing bus shelter, with palm trees and distant smokestacks emerging through the dusk haze. As the camera moves forward, the view opens up to reveal a full moon in the sky and a shift in perspective toward an industrial waterfront, where palm trees now line the left side of the road. The scene then expands as the highway passes beneath massive, towering digital billboards that dominate the left field of vision. Finally, the industrial skyline recedes to make way for a prominent mountain backdrop, with street lights periodically flashing across the wet asphalt.
